title: 有馬記念の後に・Sweet Memories

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion has won the Arima Kinen. Amidst the
cheers, Daiwa Scarlet congratulates her on her
victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, Air Shakur disparages her
loss. She explains that while she was struggling
against the conclusion her data foretold, she
found hope watching Fine Motion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She believed that if she could stop Fine Motion
from going home, it would prove that her own
fate wasn't set in stone either. But in the end, the
conclusion didn't change. Despite that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion picks up on Air Shakur's sheer
determination and entrusts her with the task of
changing the conclusion. And with that, she
wishes her farewell.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a press conference after the race, where
Fine Motion announces her return to Ireland. As
she speaks, her eyes glisten with tears...
